    Alibaba Group (BABA) Earnings Date, Estimates & Call Transcripts

    $122.07 +0.02 (+0.01%)
    Closing price 04/2/2026 03:59 PM Eastern
    Extended Trading
    $122.11 +0.04 (+0.04%)
    As of 08:48 AM Eastern
    Extended trading is trading that happens on electronic markets outside of regular trading hours. This is a fair market value extended hours price provided by Massive. Learn more.

    Alibaba Group Earnings Summary

    Alibaba Group issued Q3 2026 earnings on February 14, 2026, reporting an EPS of $0.13. Quarterly revenue was reported to be $40.71 billion. With a trailing EPS of $5.30 and a P/E Ratio of 23.03, Alibaba Group's earnings are expected to grow 18.19% next year, from $7.86 to $9.29 per share.

    Q3 2026 Earnings Resources

    • Q3 2026 Earnings Report

    BABA Upcoming Earnings

    Alibaba Group's next earnings date is estimated for Thursday, May 21, 2026, based on past reporting schedules.

    Upcoming Q4
    Earnings Date
    May. 21Before Market OpensEstimated
    Actual Revenue
    (Feb. 14)
    $40.71B

    BABA Earnings Estimates and Actuals by Quarter

    The chart below shows up to four years of a company's earnings history. The dark blue line represents the company's actual earnings per share. The light blue area represents the range of Wall Street analysts' earnings estimates for each quarter.

    BABA Estimated and Actual Revenue by Quarter

    The chart below shows up to four years of a company's revenue history. The dark blue line represents the company's actual revenue. The light blue line represents the company's estimated revenue based on the consensus of Wall Street analysts for each quarter.

    Alibaba Group Earnings - Frequently Asked Questions

    Alibaba Group has not confirmed its next earnings publication date, but the company's estimated earnings date is Thursday, May 21st, 2026 based off last year's report dates. Learn more on BABA's earnings history.

    Alibaba Group (NYSE:BABA) has a recorded annual revenue of $137.30 billion.

    Alibaba Group (NYSE:BABA) has a recorded net income of $17.93 billion. BABA has generated $5.30 earnings per share over the last four quarters.

    Alibaba Group (NYSE:BABA) has a trailing price-to-earnings ratio of 23.03 and a forward price-to-earnings ratio of 15.53. The price/earnings-to-growth ratio is 2.12.

    Alibaba Group's earnings are expected to grow from $7.86 per share to $9.29 per share in the next year, which is a 18.19% increase.
